title: Anthropic Is Now Worth Almost a Trillion Dollars
script: Anthropic just raised $65 billion in a new funding round, pushing its valuation to $965 billion — making it the most valuable AI startup on the planet. CEO Dario Amodei says the company's next model, Mythos, arrives in weeks. Mythos can find vulnerabilities in live software and chain them into cyber attacks. Anthropic also shipped Claude Opus 4.8, its safest model yet. The AI race has a new leader.
